Task: draft a tiny local pre-read with 1 thesis line and 3 short agenda bullets for a meeting deciding how to phase medical AI adoption. Keep the body under 90 wor...
summary_text: Thesis: Phase medical AI adoption by risk and accountability, not by novelty, so clinical trust and operational learning scale together. - Start with low-risk, high-ambiguity tasks where humans can verify outputs. - Define audit, escalation, and responsibility boundaries before wider rollout. - Use each phase to measure safety, workflow friction, and training needs. consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
